block_00: Don't fall for a deposit bonus scam
block_03: Lately, we're receiving reports of dubious deposit bonus offers on third-party websites and on YouTube, by using images and videos of our platform. Please be aware that these offers are fraudulent and invalid! IQ Option is a broker following international regulations and holding various licenses, which means it's not allowed by law to offer any kind of bonuses on deposits.
block_04: You are strongly advised to exercise great caution when you receive such offers — not only will you not receive the bonus, but you will also lose your deposit.
block_05: How to spot a scam website?
block_06: Pay attention to how payments are made. IQ Option allows payments only from your personal account or from the official app. If you were suggested to pay via third party websites, YouTube channels or Telegram/WhatsApp chats, be aware — this is a scam.
block_07: Check the legitimacy of the service provider that you are going to deposit money into. Does it operate from a legal entity with a legitimate address? Does it appear on official regulators' black lists (like
block_12: Check if and when you will be able to withdraw your deposit after you get the bonus. In case of special offers from our side, we would never lock your money.
block_13: Double-check that the website logo matches the official IQ Option logo to make sure you're on the right page.
